title: bidens campylotheca subsp. pentamera
intro: Bidens campylotheca subsp. pentamera, also known as the African devil's needle, is a plant species belonging to the aster family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The Bidens campylotheca subsp. pentamera is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice to aid in the treatment of skin conditions.
